Who We Are

The Story Built on
Belief

CRISTIANO Football Academy was founded in 2025 by PARTH S PRASHATH — a footballer who saw something missing in Kannur. Not just a place to train, but a system that actually develops players. A structure that takes raw talent and turns it into something real.

From day one, the philosophy was simple: no shortcuts, no passengers. Every session is intentional. Every player is coached as an individual. The goal was never to run a football class — it was to build a legacy institution that Kannur could be proud of.

In less than a year, CRISTIANO has trained over 142 players, represented Kannur in the National Youth I-League, and built a standard that no other local academy matches. This is just the beginning.

Discipline
Development
Excellence
2025
Founded
Chimbu
Founder & Head Coach — AMICS Football Academy
AFC C Licence Certified
Our Purpose

Where We're Going Vision &
Mission

01
Vision

To Be Kerala's Most Respected Football Academy

We envision CRISTIANO Football Academy as the gold standard for youth football development in Kerala — a place where raw talent from Kannur and beyond is shaped into disciplined, technically complete players capable of competing at national and international levels.

National Standard
Long-Term Vision
Est. 2025
02
Mission

Develop Complete Players, Not Just Footballers

Our mission is to provide every young player with AFC-standard coaching, position-specific training, and the mental foundations to succeed both on and off the pitch. We build character through discipline, confidence through repetition, and careers through relentless development.

AFC-Standard
Holistic Growth
Integrity
Honest coaching, honest effort
Intensity
Every session, maximum focus
Community
Kannur's football family
Growth
Relentless, measurable progress

Proof of Work

What We've Built Results That
Speak

In our very first year,CRISTIANO didn't just participate — we competed, we won, and we sent players to every level of the game. These aren't promises. They're facts from 2025 alone.

2025 · Kannur
Chakolas Tournament

CRISTIANO entered Chakolas 2025 and came out champions. A statement win in our debut competitive season — against established clubs with years of history behind them.

The AMICS System

How We Build Players Player Progression
Timeline

This isn't luck. This is structure. See how CRISTIANO turns a raw prospect into a competitive footballer — step by step.

Ambadi
Midfielder  ·  AMICS FA
Featured Journey
Early 2025
Joins AMICS Academy
Ambadi walks onto the AMICS ground as a raw prospect — good instincts, unstructured technique. From day one, he trains under an AFC-licensed system built to develop players the right way.
Foundation Phase
Mid 2025
First Competitive Appearance
Selected for the AMICS squad at the Chakolas Tournament 2025. Ambadi holds his own against older, more experienced players — earning the trust of the coaching staff in a championship-winning campaign.
Chakolas 2025 · Champions
Late 2025
District Recognition
His consistent performances catch the attention of selectors. Ambadi is called up for Kannur District assessment — recognition that the AMICS system is producing players the wider football community notices.
Kannur District · Selected
2026 — Next
The Road Ahead
State trials. National youth competitions. The ceiling is unwritten. At AMICS, this is where every player's story is still being built — and Ambadi's is just beginning.
In Progress
How We Train

Built for Every StagePrograms &
Structure

Three age-defined pathways. One system. Designed to take a player from first touch to professional consideration.

U9–U12
Foundation

Grassroots Development

Building the love for the game alongside fundamental motor skills, ball mastery, and basic positional awareness. Low-pressure, high-repetition training designed for cognitive and physical growth.

  • Ball mastery & coordination
  • Small-sided games (3v3, 5v5)
  • Fun-first competitive exposure
  • AFC-aligned session design
  • 6 sessions / week
SessionsMon – Sat
Time6:00 AM
FormatGroup
Core Program
U13–U16
Elite Development

Competitive Training

The heart of the CRISTIANO system. Position-specific training, tactical understanding, and physical conditioning tailored for district, state and national competition preparation.

  • Position-specific coaching
  • Tactical & formation work
  • Video analysis sessions
  • Physical conditioning
  • Tournament exposure
SessionsMon – Sat
Time6 AM & 5:30 PM
FormatSquad
U17–U19
Performance

Pre-Professional Pathway

For players targeting professional contracts, state teams, and national youth selection. Advanced tactical, physical, and mental preparation with direct scouting exposure.

  • Advanced tactical periodisation
  • Strength & conditioning
  • Nutrition & recovery guidance
  • Trial & scout exposure
  • Career pathway planning
SessionsMon – Sat
Time5:30 PM
FormatHigh Perf.
Weekly Structure
MonTechnical
TueTactical
WedPhysical
ThuPosition
FriGame Model
SatScrimmage
SunRecovery
The CRISTIANO Journey

From Kannur to the WorldPlayer
Pathway

Every player who walks into CRISTIANO follows a structured progression. Here's how we take raw talent to professional readiness — by age group, by stage.

U9 – U12
Foundation
  • First touch & ball feel
  • Movement & coordination
  • School-level competition
→
U13 – U16
Development
  • District selection trials
  • National Youth I-League
  • Position specialisation
→
U17 – U19
Elite
  • State & SGFI selection
  • Scout exposure
  • Pre-professional prep
→
Senior
Professional
  • I-League / ISL pathway
  • National team aspiration
  • CRISTIANO alumni network
Grassroots
U9 · U10 · U11 · U12
Build love for the game
Youth
U13 · U14 · U15 · U16
Compete and develop
Junior
U17 · U18 · U19
Earn professional attention
Alumni
Senior Level
Represent Kannur & beyond
Trial Day — CRISTIANO Ground, Kannur
Join the Academy

How to
Join CRISTIANO

Our trial process is straightforward, fair, and focused on potential — not just current ability. We look for attitude and coachability as much as technical skill.

01
Express Interest
Reach out via Instagram @zaiva.studio or contact the academy directly. Share your child's age group and availability.
02
Trial Session
Attend a structured 60-minute trial session. Coaches assess technical ability, physical conditioning, tactical understanding, and — most importantly — attitude.
03
Coach Evaluation
Within 48 hours, the coaching staff delivers personalised feedback. Selected players receive a formal offer with programme details and joining information.
04
Welcome to CRISTIANO
Complete registration, collect your kit, and begin your CRISTIANO journey. Parents receive an onboarding brief covering training schedules and academy expectations.
Next trials openEnquire via Instagram
Apply Now →

Life at AMICS

The Culture.
The Intensity.

Where We Train

Built for PerformanceFacilities &
Infrastructure

CRISTIANO Training Ground
Kannur, Kerala — Est. 2025

Full-Size Training Pitch

Regulation-size grass pitch maintained for year-round training. Suitable for 11v11 match simulations and full tactical sessions.

Primary Ground

Small-Sided Game Areas

Dedicated zones for 5v5 and 7v7 sessions. Designed for high-intensity small-sided games and position-specific drills.

Multi-Zone

Strength & Conditioning

Outdoor conditioning area for athletic development. Agility ladders, resistance equipment and functional training tools available for performance groups.

Performance

Changing Rooms

Clean, organised changing facilities for all squads. Pre- and post-session briefing area used for tactical walkthroughs and team meetings.

Player Welfare

Video Analysis Suite

Dedicated screen and projection setup for video analysis. Match footage and training clips reviewed with senior squads to develop tactical intelligence.

Coming 2026

Residential Block

Purpose-built residential housing for outstation players — currently in planning. Part of our vision to create a fully self-contained football development environment.

Planned — 2026/27
Coming Soon
Planned for 2026 — 27

The CRISTIANO
Residential
Programme

Our most ambitious vision: a fully integrated residential football academy where players from across Kerala and India can live, train, study, and grow under one roof. Everything is designed to eliminate every obstacle between a talented player and their potential.

On-campus housing for 40+ players
Partnered academic schooling
Nutritionist-designed meal plans
Sports psychology support
Full medical & physiotherapy unit
Open to national & international talent
